comment: Maps model_profile (economy/default/max) to per-skill leader model. Applied via skill-frontmatter-sync.mjs to source SKILL.md frontmatter (model: field). The value 'inherit' means: REMOVE the model: field so the skill runs on the session model the user picked via /model (absence = inherit). Sub-step Agent({model}) routing is independent — see agent-model.mjs.

policy.economy: Sonnet 중심, 기계적 스킬은 haiku — inherit 없음(지출 상한)
policy.default: 판단형 스킬은 inherit(세션 모델), 단순 스킬 haiku
policy.max: 품질 우선 — 판단형 스킬은 inherit(세션 모델), 순수 기계적 작업만 haiku 유지

handoff.rationale: pure delegate — CLI does all work

later.rationale: pure delegate — CLI queue ops + display

trace.rationale: trace analysis benefits from deeper model

kit.rationale: judgment — orchestration entrypoint rides the session model

build.rationale: judgment — planning + DAG reasoning rides the session model

op.rationale: judgment — strategy orchestration rides the session model

solver.rationale: judgment — structured problem solving rides the session model

ship.rationale: judgment — release decisions ride the session model

review.rationale: judgment — review depth rides the session model

eval.rationale: judgment — quality scoring rides the session model

probe.rationale: judgment — investigation reasoning rides the session model

agent.rationale: judgment — agent orchestration rides the session model
